summary: The project has multiple critical and high-severity vulnerabilities in its dependencies, including Apache Tomcat, Spring Security, and Jackson Databind. These vulnerabilities can lead to remote code execution, information disclosure, and other security issues. It is recommended to update these dependencies to the latest versions and apply the necessary patches.

findings.title: Apache Tomcat Vulnerability
findings.root_cause: Apache Tomcat is vulnerable to remote code execution
findings.evidence: Apache Tomcat is vulnerable to remote code execution
findings.suggested_fix: Upgrade Apache Tomcat to version 9.0.118, 10.1.55, or 11.0.22

findings.title: Spring Security Vulnerability
findings.root_cause: Spring Security is vulnerable to remote code execution
findings.evidence: Spring Security is vulnerable to remote code execution
findings.suggested_fix: Upgrade Spring Security to version 6.5.9 or 7.0.4

findings.title: Jackson Databind Vulnerability
findings.root_cause: Jackson Databind is vulnerable to remote code execution
findings.evidence: Jackson Databind is vulnerable to remote code execution
findings.suggested_fix: Upgrade Jackson Databind to version 2.18.8, 3.1.4, or 2.21.4

findings.suggested_fix: Upgrade Apache Tomcat to version 9.0.118, 10.1.55, or 11.0.22
